title: alysicarpus tetragonolobus var. micranthus
intro: Alysicarpus tetragonolobus var. micranthus, also known as the small-flowered alysicarpus or small-flowered horse gram, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which are rich in protein, fiber, and various minerals. The health benefits associated with Alysicarpus tetragonolobus var. micranthus include its potential to help manage diabetes, lower cholesterol levels, and aid in weight management. The herbal preparations of this plant include seeds that can be used as a dietary supplement, and the seeds are also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to prepare various formulations.
